prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 北京工业大学在新疆理科2024年最低位次约6396名，2025年大幅前移至约4824名，一年间前移约1572名，反映出该校在新疆的报考热度显著上升。2025年基准位 次约4824名；该校在新疆理科招生计划2024年为12人，2025年增至14人，2026年（招生计划文件）仍为14人，与2025年持平，无扩招或缩招带来的竞争变化。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 2026年 声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及一名拟录取研究生因不当言论被取消资格事件，对报考心理有轻微抑制作用；抖音热度排名第57位，评价为较热，短视频平台有一定曝光度。历史投档 异常记录中未见明显断档信号；第五轮学科评估中，环境科学与工程获评A，光学工程、土木工程、材料科学与工程、软件工程获评A-，工科实力较为均衡。招 生专业中信息安全对应软件工程A-，土木类对应土木工程A-，材料类对应材料科学与工程A-，环境类对应环境科学与工程A；北京工业大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第65名，近年排名稳定在60-72区间，属于中上水平理工类高校。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 信息安全（计算机类）社会 热度高热推荐，能源动力类社会热度推荐，土木建筑类分化观望，材料类与环境类属生化环材大类呈明显劝退态势。新疆2025年理科考生约52538人，2026年总考生约238000人（ 含不确定标记），按近年理科占比约68.6%估算，2026年理科考生约16.3万人，较2025年大幅增加，整体竞争加剧。新疆理科本科一批2024年390分、2025年421分，；北京工业大学位于北京，对新疆考生而言属于跨省求学，地域偏好因素中性。该校在全国招生总量中新疆占比极小，属非重 点生源省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅前移的强势走势、2026年招生计划持平、新疆理科考生总数显著增加导致竞争加剧、学校声誉偏负面轻微抑制热度等因素，预 计2026年最低录取位次在2025年基准4824名基础上小幅后移。预测最低位次约4900名，波动区间4400-5400名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 信息安全（实验班）
- 能源动力类（能源与动力工程、新能源科学与工程）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 材料类（实验班）（材料科学与工程、纳米材料与技术等）
- 土木类（土木工程、给排水科学与工程、建筑环境与能源应用工程）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 环境科学与工程类（环境工程、环境科学）
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间4400-5400名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（4400名以内）可重点冲刺信息安全（实验班）等热门专业；位次接近区间上限（5400名附近）应以三档环境类保底、二档土木/材料类为主。该校招生专业较少（仅5个），建议全部填报以增加录取概率。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: Beijing University of Technology's minimum ranking in Xinjiang Science in 2024 was approximately 6396, and in 2025 it significantly advanced to about 4824, moving forward by about 1572 places in one year, reflecting a notable increase in application popularity in Xinjiang. The 2025 baseline ranking is about 4824; the enrollment plan for Science in Xinjiang was 12 in 2024, increased to 14 in 2025, and remains 14 in 2026 (enrollment plan document), unchanged from 2025, with no competition changes due to expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: In 2026, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving an incident where a prospective graduate student had their admission revoked due to inappropriate remarks, which has a mild inhibitory effect on application psychology; Douyin popularity ranking is 57th, rated as relatively hot, with some exposure on short video platforms. No obvious signal of historical admission anomalies; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Environmental Science and Engineering was rated A, Optical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, and Software Engineering were rated A-, indicating a balanced engineering strength. Among the enrollment majors, Information Security corresponds to Software Engineering A-, Civil Engineering category corresponds to Civil Engineering A-, Materials category corresponds to Materials Science and Engineering A-, Environmental category corresponds to Environmental Science and Engineering A; Beijing University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Ranking, it is about 65th, with recent rankings stable in the 60-72 range, belonging to an upper-middle level science and engineering university.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Information Security (Computer category) has high social popularity and is highly recommended, Energy and Power category is socially recommended, Civil and Construction category is differentiated and wait-and-see, Materials and Environmental categories belong to the biology, chemistry, environment, and materials group, showing a clear trend of discouragement. In 2025, the number of Science examinees in Xinjiang is about 52,538, and in 2026, the total number of examinees is about 238,000 (with uncertain markers). Based on the recent Science proportion of about 68.6%, the estimated number of Science examinees in 2026 is about 163,000, a significant increase from 2025, intensifying overall competition. The first batch of Science undergraduate in Xinjiang was 390 points in 2024 and 421 points in 2025; Beijing University of Technology is located in Beijing, which for Xinjiang examinees means studying across provinces, with a neutral regional preference factor. The university's enrollment in Xinjiang accounts for a very small proportion of its total national enrollment, making it a non-key source province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong upward trend in rankings in 2025, the unchanged enrollment plan in 2026, the significant increase in the total number of Science examinees in Xinjiang leading to intensified competition, and the slightly negative reputation mildly suppressing enthusiasm, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly move back from the 2025 baseline of 4824. The predicted minimum ranking is about 4900, with a fluctuation range of 4400-5400.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Information Security (Experimental Class)
- Energy and Power Category (Energy and Power Engineering, New Energy Science and Engineering)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Materials Category (Experimental Class) (Materials Science and Engineering, Nanomaterials and Technology, etc.)
- Civil Engineering Category (Civil Engineering, Water Supply and Drainage Science and Engineering, Building Environment and Energy Application Engineering)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Environmental Science and Engineering Category (Environmental Engineering, Environmental Science)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 4400-5400, it is recommended to mainly fill in Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 majors as a stretch and Tier 3 majors as a safety. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 4400), focus on stretching for popular majors like Information Security (Experimental Class); if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 5400), use Tier 3 Environmental category as a safety and Tier 2 Civil/Materials categories as the main choices. The university has few enrollment majors (only 5), so it is recommended to fill in all to increase the probability of admission.
